name: MCP Server
description:
MCP (Model Context Protocol) Server for IntelliJ IDEs This plugin integrates the MCP server into IntelliJ-based IDEs, enabling seamless communication between Large Language Models (LLMs) and your development environment. It provides tools for interacting with the IDE, including:
  • Reading the current file
  • Executing terminal commands
  • Setting breakpoints
  • Searching project files
  • And more
